query:
SELECT 'leads' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM leads
UNION ALL SELECT 'campaigns', COUNT(*) FROM campaigns
UNION ALL SELECT 'templates', COUNT(*) FROM templates
UNION ALL SELECT 'onboardings', COUNT(*) FROM onboardings
UNION ALL SELECT 'testimonials', COUNT(*) FROM testimonials
UNION ALL SELECT 'call_recordings', COUNT(*) FROM call_recordings
UNION ALL SELECT 'messages', COUNT(*) FROM messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'activity_logs', COUNT(*) FROM activity_logs;
